projectDescription: A structured adversarial review protocol that stress-tests ideas, plans, prompts, procedures, code, and AI outputs by activating an AI as a critical reviewer that finds gaps, weak logic, missing constraints, and shaky fixes — with optional ping-pong mode across two AI chats.
keyFeatures: Adversarial review protocol that forces AI to find structural flaws, not offer praise
Ping-pong mode: two independent AI chats challenge the same artifact in alternating passes
Structured finding format with severity levels (HIGH/MED/LOW), evidence anchoring, and concrete fixes
Provenance tracking across review rounds with finding IDs and derived_from lineage
Merge Status in Round 2+ to confirm, challenge, or surface new fixes
Round detection logic to automatically manage multi-round review sessions
Section concentration rule to prevent reviews from over-focusing on one area
Works on any structured artifact: plans, prompts, code, specs, checklists, decisions
publicApiSurface: finding_id / fix_id / origin_round / derived_from provenance fields
